phaseDescs: Learn quality movement, prioritise form over depth
Increase hold times and set counts
Introduce PNF / Contract-Relax, add load where indicated

A.focus: Posterior chain loading, hip external rotation depth, split prep

exercises.name: Sliding Hamstring Curl
exercises.notes: Face-down, hook band/towel on heel, curl toward glutes. Eccentric hamstring strength — prevents strains from high steps.

exercises.name: Jefferson Curls, Tempo
exercises.notes: Standing on box, roll spine down vertebra by vertebra, 8s descent. Add 2.5–5kg plate in Wks 7–8 only if pain-free.

exercises.name: Deficit RDL, Tempo
exercises.notes: Heels elevated 2–3cm, slow hinge to max hamstring length. Keep spine neutral. Prioritise depth over load.

exercises.name: Hip Flexor Compression
exercises.notes: Supine, pull knee to chest with hands then actively hold without hands 2s. RIGHT SIDE PRIORITY — Morpho Combat direct fix.

exercises.name: Elevated Pigeon, Static
exercises.notes: Front shin parallel on box/step. Fold forward over shin. Hip external rotation — direct transfer to drop-knees and flagging.

exercises.name: Half Split Iso, Static
exercises.notes: Front leg straight, back knee down. Hold at max depth. Add 10 overhead reaches in final set from Wk 3+.

exercises.name: Moving Frog, Tempo
exercises.notes: Frog position, actively rock knees toward floor with 8s controlled descent. Dynamic hip external rotation at depth. From Lattice Plan 6 Week 9.

exercises.name: Fire Hydrant
exercises.notes: Quadruped, lift knee out to side in full external rotation, hold top 1s. Active outer hip strength at end range. From Lattice Plans 6 & 7.

B.focus: Shoulder health maintenance after climbing, thoracic decompression

exercises.name: Banded External Rotation
exercises.notes: Band at elbow height, hold at 90°, rotate forearm up and out. Rotator cuff health is climbing longevity.

exercises.name: Behind the Back Internal Rotation
exercises.notes: Arm behind back, reach up toward opposite shoulder blade. Post-climb shoulder IR is your recovery ritual.

exercises.name: Trap 3 Raise
exercises.notes: Prone, arm at Y-angle (135°), raise with thumb up. Lower trap activation — counters upper trap overdominance climbing creates.

exercises.name: Thread the Needle, Dynamic
exercises.notes: Quadruped, thread one arm under body and rotate thorax open. Thoracic decompression after forward-hunched climbing posture.

exercises.name: Arch Lat Stretch, Static
exercises.notes: Arm overhead on wall or rings, lateral lean away. Full lat lengthening — lats are chronically short in climbers.

exercises.name: Downward Dog, Static
exercises.notes: Heels drive toward floor, shoulders externally rotate, push into floor. Full posterior chain decompression.

C.focus: Sagittal split work meets frontal plane adductor loading — front split and side split in one session

exercises.name: SL Good Morning, Tempo
exercises.notes: Single leg, hinge to 90° while other leg floats back. Hamstring + posterior hip loading while standing.

exercises.name: Standing Wide Straddle Fold
exercises.notes: Feet 2–3x shoulder width, fold forward from hips keeping spine long. Gravity-assisted adductor load — direct side split stimulus.

exercises.name: Couch Stretch, Kneeling
exercises.notes: Wks 1–6: kneeling, rear foot elevated. Wks 7–8: foot fully on wall for max depth. Posterior pelvic tilt to deepen.

exercises.name: Cossack Squat, Tempo
exercises.notes: Wide stance, 8s descent into deep lateral lunge. Active adductor loading through functional range. Transfers directly to stemming and wide dropknees.

exercises.name: Abductor Flyes
exercises.notes: Side-lying: raise top leg to max height, 2s hold, slow lower. Builds active hip abduction strength.

exercises.name: Half Sliding Front Splits
exercises.notes: Front heel on slider/towel, slide forward while hinging, 8s descent. Active front split prep.

exercises.name: Front Split, Contract-Relax
exercises.notes: At max split depth: press front heel and back knee into floor 5s, release and sink deeper. PNF — moves end range faster than static holding.

exercises.name: Alternating High Steps
exercises.notes: Step one foot up high onto box (hip height+), stand through fully. Hold top 2s. Direct carryover for Morpho Combat.

D.focus: Hip abduction flexibility for dropknees, flagging, and wide hip positions

exercises.name: Rocking Pancake
exercises.notes: Seated straddle, rock forward keeping spine long. Building active range in pancake.

exercises.name: Banded Straddle, Static
exercises.notes: Band around knees pulling legs apart. Gradually increase band tension over weeks.

exercises.name: Inverse Banded Straddle
exercises.notes: Band pulling legs together, actively resist with abductors. Builds active strength in gained range.

exercises.name: Butchers Block, Contract-Relax
exercises.notes: Supine, legs wide — contract adductors hard 5s, relax and sink wider. Classic PNF for straddle gains.

exercises.name: Leaning Pancake, Tempo
exercises.notes: In straddle, lean sideways toward one leg with 8s descent, reach arm overhead.

exercises.name: Horse Stance Reps, Tempo
exercises.notes: Wide stance squat, 8s descent to max depth. Hip abductor + adductor strength through deep range.

exercises.name: Pancake Leg Lifts / Circles
exercises.notes: Seated straddle, actively lift one leg off floor, slow lower. Add circles from Wks 5+. From Lattice Plan 6.

exercises.name: Weighted Tailors Pose, Tempo
exercises.notes: Seated butterfly, weight on knees, 8s slow press toward floor. From Wks 5+: add PNF — press knees up 5s, release, 4–5r. Drives butterfly-to-floor goal.

E.focus: Recover tissues, consolidate range, third weekly straddle stimulus — after climbing

exercises.name: Pigeon Pose, Static
exercises.notes: Hip external rotation recovery after climbing. Different angle than Elevated Pigeon in Session A.

exercises.name: Couch Stretch, Kneeling
exercises.notes: Shorter prescription than Wed — this is recovery, not loading.

exercises.name: Downward Dog, Static
exercises.notes: Full posterior chain decompression after climbing.

exercises.name: Seated Straddle, Static
exercises.notes: Third weekly straddle stimulus alongside Thu and Sun.

exercises.name: Arch Lat Stretch, Static
exercises.notes: Lat recovery after a full climbing day.

exercises.name: Thread the Needle, Static
exercises.notes: Thoracic rotation and decompression.

F.focus: Recover, integrate the week's gains, work passive depth — gentle but consistent

exercises.name: Active Outer Hip, Tempo
exercises.notes: Supine, knee bent, externally rotate hip through full range with 8s slow control.

exercises.name: Frog Passive, Static
exercises.notes: Knees wide, hips back, elbows on floor. Recovery-depth work — relax completely.

exercises.name: Wall Splits, Seated, Static
exercises.notes: Legs up wall in straddle, gravity as passive force.

exercises.name: Banded Pancake Pull, Static
exercises.notes: Band around hips pulling you forward in seated straddle. This is where pancake gains consolidate.

exercises.name: Side Runner, Static
exercises.notes: Wide-stance lunge to one side. Every flag, stem, and drop-knee benefits.

exercises.name: High Straddle Up
exercises.notes: Seated straddle, actively lift one straight leg as high as possible. Builds active straddle height. From Lattice Plan 5.

exercises.name: Tailors Pose, Weighted, Static
exercises.notes: Seated butterfly, light weight on knees, passive hold. Recovery version of Thursday's tempo work.

exercises.name: Standing Triangle, Static
exercises.notes: Wide stance, one hand to shin/floor, other arm to sky. End the week with space in your whole body.

metrics.label: Side Split
metrics.desc: Widest straddle — inner ankle to inner ankle. Target: ~160 cm.

metrics.label: Pancake Forward Fold
metrics.desc: Seated straddle, fold forward — fingertip distance beyond foot line. Target: +30 cm.

metrics.label: High Step (Right)
metrics.desc: Max box height you can step onto and stand from with RIGHT leg, no hands.

metrics.label: High Step (Left)
metrics.desc: Max box height with LEFT leg. Track alongside right to monitor asymmetry.

metrics.label: Front Split
metrics.desc: Hip bone height from floor in front split. Target: 0 cm.

metrics.label: Butterfly (Knees to Floor)
metrics.desc: Outer knee to floor in butterfly. Target: 0 cm.

morningBlocks.title: Integration
exs: Hip IR without hands · 30s active control

phaseDescs: Increase max force production — top sets of 3→2, back-offs
Express strength, test new max — opener single, deload, test

cycleMap.notes: Build foundation, learn RPE, find groove
Gains slow down — technique matters most

accessoryLibrary.name: Deficit Deadlift (1–2")
accessoryLibrary.why: Strengthens bottom position, builds off-the-floor power

accessoryLibrary.name: Block/Rack Pull
accessoryLibrary.why: Overloads lockout, builds confidence with heavy weight

accessoryLibrary.name: Dumbbell Row
accessoryLibrary.why: Same as barbell row, less grip fatigue

accessoryLibrary.name: Ab Wheel Rollout
accessoryLibrary.why: Anti-extension core, protects low back under heavy loads

accessoryLibrary.name: Front Squat
accessoryLibrary.why: Quad + upper back strength, supports DL positioning

accessoryLibrary.name: Good Morning
accessoryLibrary.why: Posterior chain endurance, low back resilience

rpeScale.desc: Could do 4+ more reps. Warm-up weight.
Could do 3 more reps. Moderate effort.
Could do 2 more reps. Solid working weight.
Could do 1 more rep. Near-max effort.
Maximum effort. Nothing left in the tank.
